query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 360021
(360021, 'What is the primary goal of biblical hermeneutics?', 'multiple_choice', '["To memorize Scripture","To interpret Scripture accurately","To translate ancient languages","To write commentaries"]', 'To interpret Scripture accurately', 1),
(360021, 'Which principle emphasizes understanding Scripture in its original context?', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorical interpretation","Historical-grammatical method","Devotional reading","Topical study"]', 'Historical-grammatical method', 2),
(360021, 'The term hermeneutics comes from which Greek word?', 'multiple_choice', '["Logos","Hermeneuō","Exegesis","Didaskō"]', 'Hermeneuō', 3),
(360021, 'What is exegesis?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reading meaning into the text","Drawing meaning out of the text","Comparing translations","Memorizing verses"]', 'Drawing meaning out of the text', 4),
(360021, 'Which of these is NOT a step in proper biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Observation","Interpretation","Application","Speculation"]', 'Speculation', 5),
(360021, 'What does sola scriptura mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture alone","Faith alone","Grace alone","Christ alone"]', 'Scripture alone', 6),
(360021, 'The literal-historical method focuses on what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hidden spiritual meanings","The plain meaning of the text","Allegorical interpretations","Personal revelations"]', 'The plain meaning of the text', 7),
(360021, 'Why is understanding genre important in interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["It determines translation method","Different genres have different interpretive rules","It makes reading easier","Genre is not important"]', 'Different genres have different interpretive rules', 8),
(360021, 'What is eisegesis?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reading meaning out of the text","Reading meaning into the text","Comparing manuscripts","Studying word origins"]', 'Reading meaning into the text', 9),
(360021, 'The Protestant Reformation emphasized which interpretive principle?', 'multiple_choice', '["Church tradition over Scripture","Scripture interprets Scripture","Papal authority in interpretation","Mystical revelation"]', 'Scripture interprets Scripture', 10),
(360021, 'Explain the difference between exegesis and eisegesis and why this distinction matters for biblical interpretation.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Exegesis draws meaning out of the text while eisegesis reads meaning into it. This matters because proper interpretation requires letting Scripture speak for itself.', 11);

(360021, 'What does sola scriptura mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture alone","Faith alone","Grace alone","Christ alone"]', 'Scripture alone', 6),

This matters because proper interpretation requires letting Scripture speak for itself.', 11);
